scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/api run start" "npm --prefix apps/web run start"
